2196290.name: Propnight Supporter Pack
2196290.description:
Hello everyone, we are happy to announce Propnight Supporter pack. This is a bundle of extra goodies for the people who want to go another extra mile to support Propnight developers.

The Propnight Supporter Pack includes the following digital items:

• Exclusive premium skin "Supernova" for Kate
• Exclusive premium skin "Elite" for Taiga
• Exclusive premium skin "Elite" for Isaac
• Exclusive premium skin "Royal School" for Mable
• Exclusive premium skin "Silver Dragon" for Jun

• Sheet-man unlocked
• Possum unlocked
• Maddy unlocked
• Jun unlocked
• Aisha unlocked
2196290.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 波兰语, 俄语, 土耳其语, 瑞典语, 繁体中文, 简体中文, 韩语, 日语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
